what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-15 located in the design-source channel under recent-pitches; it stores YAML frontmatter with addressing, blob reference, MIME type, authorship, timestamp, and a one-line source-attribution body.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and empty links
The image dimensions w and h are both 0
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-15.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg record
It references a content-addressed blob rather than embedding the image
It belongs to the design-source channel and recent-pitches path
Source is explicitly marked as design_source_material
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is suspicious for an image metadata record
No descriptive caption, alt text, or preview
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are captured
It is unclear whether the referenced blob is resolvable from this file alone
notes: A minimal, source-attributed ledger stub for a design pitch image that points to a blob but lacks dimensions and descriptive context.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does p-15.jpg contain?
Is the blob reference blob://b2:a5fa04c7334a58861a82bf488f499e7d currently resolvable?
Why are there no links to related pitches, designs, or sessions?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a design-source ground-truth image record matches the content; it is a metadata stub for an image asset.
intention_signals: The file appears to be registering a design pitch image in channel memory so it can be located by channel/path, traced to an author session, and retrieved via its blob reference.
novelty: The most unusual aspect is the 0x0 dimension record for an image asset; otherwise it is a standard ledger metadata stub.
contribution: It contributes a named, addressable metadata anchor that links a design-source pitch image to its blob, channel, path, author session, and creation timestamp, enabling retrieval and provenance tracking without embedding the image data.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the image asset recent-pitches/p-15 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:a5fa04c7334a58861a82bf488f499e7d with image/jpeg MIME type and 0x0 dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source pitch image with provenance and a content-addressed blob reference for later retrieval and fusion.
